---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working correctly
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what went wrong.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Paste any error messages or stack traces here.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| OS | e.g. macOS 14.5 / Ubuntu 24.04 |
| Pingnet version | e.g. 0.1.0 |
| Rust version | `rustc --version` |
| Node version | `node --version` |

## Additional context

Screenshots, logs, or anything else that might help.
